author_declared_design.estimand: ATT for treated firms around staggered policy adoption

institutional_context.fact: Policy adoption occurred at different times across states.

contribution_statement: The paper studies how staggered policy adoption affected firm investment using firm-year panel data.
research_motivation: The author wants to understand whether policy timing altered real investment decisions.

outcome_magnitude_context.meaningful_benchmark: 10% of the sample mean is economically meaningful
